input.command:
find ./src -name "*.rs" -type f | while read f; do
  if grep -q "parse_file\s*(" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
    # Check if there's a call (not just definition)
    if grep "parse_file\s*(" "$f" | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*\*" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*//" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*#" | grep -q "parse_file\s*(" 2>/dev/null; then
      echo "$f"
    fi
  fi
done | sort -u

for f in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs; do
  # Check if file has parse_file calls (excluding definitions and comments)
  if grep "parse_file\s*(" "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*\*" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*//.*parse_file" | grep -q .; then
    echo "$f"
  fi
done

input.command:
for f in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs; do
  # Extract only the code lines (remove comments)
  if sed 's|//.*||' "$f" | grep "parse_file\s*(" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*\*" | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -q .; then
    echo "$f"
  fi
done

for f in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs; do
  # Count actual calls (remove definition lines and comments)
  count=$(sed 's|//.*||' "$f" | grep "parse_file\s*(" | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "^[[:space:]]*\*" | wc -l)
  if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "$f: $count calls"
  fi
done
